title: dotuix manifest.json
description: Manifest for a .uix portable interactive experience file

uix.markdownDescription: dotuix format version. Use `"1.0"` for all current files.

id.markdownDescription:
Stable reverse-domain identifier. Convention only — no DNS enforcement.

Examples: `com.almadina.menu`, `gov.qa.briefing.q2`

name.description: Human-readable app name shown in the viewer title bar.

version.description: SemVer version of this app. e.g. 1.0.0

minViewer.description: Minimum viewer version required to open this file. Viewer refuses gracefully if below this version.

entry.description: Path to the entry HTML file inside the .uix archive. e.g. index.html

mode.description: kiosk: locked full-screen experience. window: developer preview mode.
mode.markdownDescription:
- `kiosk` — locked full-screen, no chrome, no exit without PIN
- `window` — developer preview mode with basic toolbar

permissions.description: Optional capabilities the app is allowed to use.

items.markdownDescription:
- `local-storage` — use browser localStorage
- `print` — trigger system print dialog
- `clipboard-write` — write to clipboard
- `fullscreen` — request fullscreen from within the app
- `raw-sql` — unlock `uix.data.raw()` and `uix.state.raw()` on the bridge

network.description: Network access policy. blocked (default) or allowed.
network.markdownDescription:
- `blocked` (default) — viewer blocks all outbound network requests at the OS level
- `allowed` — outbound requests permitted

color.description: Foreground / accent color. Hex color string.

author.description: Creator identity. Typically an email address or org name.

expires.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) or null. Viewer checks expiry before extraction — expired files never unpack.

seed.description: true = the state.db in the zip is a creator seed, copy it as starting state. false (default) = start with an empty state.db.

security.description: Optional access-control block. Omit entirely for regular apps (menus, catalogues, portfolios).

auth.description: pin: viewer prompts for PIN before opening. none: no authentication.

encryptedPaths.description: Paths inside the archive encrypted with AES-256-GCM.

kdf.description: Key derivation function used to derive the AES key from the PIN.

kdfIterations.description: PBKDF2 iteration count. Higher = slower brute-force. Default 200000.

keySalt.description: Base64url random salt. Key = PBKDF2(PIN, salt, iterations). Safe to store publicly.

maxOpens.description: Max times this file may be opened. Tracked by the viewer locally.

screenshot.description: true = viewer prevents OS screenshot/screen-recording while file is open (desktop only).

signature.description: Ed25519 package signature. Written by `dotuix sign`. Do not edit manually.

signedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the file was signed.

ai.description: Optional AI provenance block. Omit for non-AI-generated files — has no effect on the viewer.
ai.markdownDescription:
Optional provenance metadata for AI-generated `.uix` files.

Stamped automatically by `@dotuix/mcp` and `@dotuix/ai`. Omit for non-AI-generated files.

generatedBy.description: Model or tool that created this file. e.g. "claude-opus-4", "@dotuix/ai", "@dotuix/mcp".

capabilities.description: Semantic capabilities this app exposes, e.g. ["search", "chat"].

promptHash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the generation prompt, for reproducibility.
